productDisplayName: Esprit Men Avalance Silver Steel Watches
description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This classic Avalance analog wrist watch from esprit is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 44 mm Case thickness: 12 mm Dial shape: Round Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Stainless steel bracelet strap with clip closure Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass Silver dial with embossed hour markings and numbered 12 o& rsquo clock marking in silver, minute marking in black and chronograph mentioning days of the week, 12-24 hour time display and stop watch Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time and day Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters that allows you to use it when swimming, but not diving
